abstainRule: probe windows near warmup (length max(2, warmup-1-offset), offsets [0,10]) per grid cell; only genuine engine abstentions kept — probes that decide are skipped, never relabeled
downsampleRule: HOLD decisions kept 1-in-7 per (receipt, grid-cell) stream, deterministic; all ENTER/EXIT/ABSTAIN kept

honesty.note: every row carries provenance {sourceReceipt, receiptSha256, datasetSha256, barIndex} and is recomputable bit-exact from the archives (given the generator pinned by generatorSha256)
honesty.rowsAre: DERIVED — deterministic replay of content-addressed dataset archives pinned by DSSE-signed MEASURED backtest receipts; the underlying feed is REPORTED venue history
honesty.timestampNote: row asOfIso = the DECISION bar close; the engine books fills at the NEXT bar close (see src/backtest.mjs) — evidence windows end at the decision bar, no lookahead
